description:
A GPU-accelerated terminal emulator

Nova is a fast, GPU-accelerated terminal emulator built with Rust and iced.
0.19.0 (2026-05-14)
Features
- ai: implement diagnostic banner (a1cd8b5)
- double-click word and triple-click line selection (09219b7)
- implement command completion suggestions with Tab accept (a1711c6)
- implement diagnostic banner ui (4612264)
- show exit code banner with AI explain suggestion for failed commands (a8eb44e)
Bug Fixes
- macos: swap arrow key modifier mapping for Option/Cmd (150ae6e)
- remove forced home cwd, open new tabs in focused tab pwd (43816d5)
- selection now scrolls with scrollback content (3951a5d)
- selection render and extraction broken during scrollback (13a30fc)
- suggestion rendering at cursor position with green underline (d878f1a)
- use accent color for shell selection highlights (reverse video + explicit) (a8408cc)
What's Changed
- feat: improve selecting by @pmqueiroz in #62
- fix: remove forced home cwd, open new tabs in focused tab pwd by @pmqueiroz in #61
- fix(macos): swap arrow key modifier mapping for Option/Cmd by @pmqueiroz in #64
- feat: implement command completion suggestions with Tab accept by @pmqueiroz in #65
- fix: suggestion rendering at cursor position with green underline by @pmqueiroz in #66
- fix: use accent color for shell selection highlights by @pmqueiroz in #67
- feat(ai): implement diagnostic banner by @pmqueiroz in #68
- feat: implement diagnostic banner ui by @pmqueiroz in #69
- chore(main): release 0.19.0 by @pmqueiroz in #63
Full Changelog: v0.18.3...v0.19.0
